description: The homeland where Lu Xun was born and spent his youth, including his former residence, Sanwei Study, and Baicao Garden.
A comprehensive scenic area combining Keyan Rock Scenery, Jianhu Lake Scenery, and the cultural charm of Luzhen.
A private garden from the Song Dynasty, the site of the love story between Lu You and Tang Wan, where Yue Opera performances can be enjoyed.
A comprehensive museum showcasing the history, culture, and local characteristics of Shaoxing.

An ancient bridge from the Song Dynasty, a transportation hub during the Southern Song period, surrounded by the original ecological water town scenery, making it an excellent place to experience old Shaoxing life.
Known as the world's largest natural bonsai landscape, visitors can take a traditional Wupeng boat into the cave to view cliff carvings.
The birthplace of educator Cai Yuanpei, where visitors can learn about the life, achievements, and ideological contributions of this pioneer of modern education reform.

attraction_name: Night Cruise on the Ring City River
description: Take a traditional Wupeng boat to tour the ring canal of Shaoxing and experience the nighttime charm of the water town.
A traditional garden park in Shaoxing city, offering a serene environment ideal for morning exercises and leisure.
